Fix: estaciones no detectadas + suspensión individual por operadora

1. Detección de estaciones en detalle de proceso ahora usa comparación
   flexible: String(), nombre+pedidoId, y busca en asignaciones_estaciones
   (misma lógica que el resto del sistema).

2. Suspensión ahora es por estación individual: cada estación con operadora
   muestra su propio botón "Suspender" en el modal de detalle. Se removió
   el botón genérico del footer.

3. Nueva función solicitarSuspensionIndividual(procesoId, pedidoId, estacionId)
   que suspende solo una estación específica.

commit.message:
Store Schwab OAuth token in Keychain (#65)

* Store Schwab OAuth token in macOS Keychain instead of JSON file

Move the Schwab OAuth token from a disk-based JSON file
(.schwab_token.json) to macOS Keychain, aligning it with all other
provider credentials. This fixes per-profile isolation (the shared
file path caused collisions) and improves security.

- Add SCHWAB_TOKEN to credential whitelist in credential_manager
- Add read_token_from_keychain/write_token_to_keychain helpers
- Switch from client_from_token_file to client_from_access_functions
- Remove SCHWAB_TOKEN_PATH from config, settings, and all scripts
- Update is_configured() to check Keychain instead of file existence
- Delete SCHWAB_TOKEN on credential removal for Schwab provider
- Update all tests, docs, and config templates

Closes #63

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Address PR review: add keychain helper tests and clarifying comments

- Add unit tests for read_token_from_keychain and write_token_to_keychain
  (None credential, valid JSON, invalid JSON, success/failure logging,
  extra args/kwargs from authlib)
- Add HACK comment explaining token_path sentinel in setup_schwab.py
- Add comment explaining silent failure tradeoff in write_token_to_keychain
- Add comment clarifying SCHWAB_TOKEN special-case in remove_credentials
- Fix dangling reference to deleted migrate_schwab_token.py in conftest.py

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* added --delete-branch to merge command

---------

Add book persistence, edit, and delete with Goodreads override protection

- New useLocalData.js hook manages three localStorage buckets:
  bookshelf_manual_v2 (added books), bookshelf_overrides_v1 (edits),
  bookshelf_deleted_v1 (removed IDs)
- Manually added books now survive page refresh
- Any book (manual or Goodreads) can be edited via BookModal; changes
  are stored as overrides so Goodreads sync never clobbers them
- Books can be removed from the shelf; deletion persists across refreshes
  and prevents Goodreads sync from restoring the book
- BookModal gains Edit / Remove buttons and inline edit form

commit.message:
fix: Settings → Matching pipeline — 4 bugs root-caused and fixed

1. phone + is_discoverable silently dropped: added both to ProfileUpdateSchema
   and update_user_profile() handler — they now reach the DB

2. Stale cache after profile save: invalidate matched:{id}:*, ai_recs:{id}:*,
   market_stats:{id} immediately after commit — changes visible in Contratos
   and Mejores Oportunidades without waiting up to 24h

3. _user_to_public() missing fields: now returns phone, is_discoverable,
   daily_digest_enabled — form re-initializes correctly on reload

4. Profile embedding stale on sector/keywords change: recompute and persist
   profile_embedding to DB on save (best-effort, non-blocking)

5. Settings.jsx: add is_discoverable:false to initial useState; add amber
   banner guiding user to Preferencias tab when sector/keywords are empty

commit.message:
Add interactive GUI player with drag-to-crop and Shift+scroll zoom

New file: vlc_player_gui.py
- Embeds libVLC in a PyQt5 window for full mouse/keyboard control
- Shift+scroll: zoom in/out in 0.25x steps (intercepted at app level
  before VLC's window can swallow the event)
- Draw Crop Box button: pauses video, takes a VLC snapshot, shows it
  as a full overlay (SnapshotCropPicker). User drags a rubber-band
  rectangle on the frozen frame. Enter confirms, Esc cancels.
- Apply Crop: sends VLC crop geometry string (WxH+X+Y) to the player
- Reset All: clears crop and zoom, restores original view
- Accepts an optional video file path as a CLI argument
- Works on Linux, Windows, macOS

requirements.txt: add python-vlc>=3.0 and PyQt5>=5.15

quickstart.sh: add 'gui' command
  ./quickstart.sh gui              # open the GUI player
  ./quickstart.sh gui myvideo.mp4  # open with a file

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix roster departure detection to check actual roster membership

Previously flagged players who dropped below Star tier as "departed",
even if still on the team (e.g. De'Aaron Fox for San Antonio).
Now checks all_player_lkp so "Out" only fires when a player
genuinely left the roster, not just declined in tier.

commit.message:
fix: stop mini charts flickering - only rebuild DOM on trial set change

Previously updateRunningTrials rebuilt innerHTML every 1s poll, destroying
canvas elements and their Chart.js instances each time.

Now:
- DOM cards rebuilt only when trial set changes (add/remove)
- Text/progress bar updated in-place via targeted querySelector
- Canvas elements kept alive across polls → charts persist
- chart.update('none') reuses existing Chart instance with new data

commit.message:
Implement translation pipeline readiness (phases 1-3 + bidirectional fix)

Translation approval gate: translations save as 'pending_review', human
approves to 'reviewed' before publication. New admin/translations page
with approve/reject. All site queries filter on reviewed status.

SESSION_PAUSE removed; per-article chunk limit retained. Bidirectional
language support: save_chunk, finalize_article, and get_chunk now detect
source_language and use correct spaCy models and glossary direction.

Academic structure glossary (27 terms). mark-reviewed.ts wrapped in
transaction with complete cleanup. Translation prompting gap documented
in decisions.md as next priority.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(sprints): prevent unresolved tickets from being orphaned in completed sprints (PUNT-296) (#361)

## Summary

- Add API validation (400 response) to block assigning unresolved
tickets to completed sprints on both ticket create and update endpoints
- Add MCP pre-flight validation in `update_ticket` and `move_ticket`
tools with clear error messages
- Add UI blocking in sprint backlog drag-and-drop with toast error for
unresolved tickets targeting completed sprints
- Enhance `SprintSelector` component with `ticketResolution` prop to
disable completed sprint options with inline warning and tooltip

## Details

**API layer** (`src/app/api/projects/[projectId]/tickets/route.ts` and
`.../[ticketId]/route.ts`):
- POST (create): Checks if `sprintId` points to a completed sprint and
the ticket has no resolution
- PATCH (update): Considers both the existing resolution and any
resolution being set in the same request (so setting resolution + sprint
in one call works)
- Returns a descriptive 400 error explaining that resolved tickets are
allowed for retroactive bookkeeping

**MCP tools** (`mcp/src/tools/tickets.ts`):
- `update_ticket`: Pre-validates sprint status, considers effective
resolution (update value or existing)
- `move_ticket`: Pre-validates sprint status against existing ticket
resolution

**UI** (`src/components/sprints/`):
- `sprint-backlog-view.tsx`: Drag-and-drop handler blocks moves of
unresolved tickets to completed sprints with an error toast
- `sprint-selector.tsx`: New `ticketResolution` prop; when ticket is
unresolved, completed sprint options are visually disabled with an
inline amber warning and tooltip

**Sprint completion safeguard**: The existing `complete` API already
requires an explicit `action` field (`close_to_next`,
`close_to_backlog`, or `close_keep`), so incomplete tickets cannot be
silently orphaned.

## Test plan

- [x] Try to assign an unresolved ticket to a completed sprint via API
(should get 400)
- [x] Try the same via MCP `update_ticket` and `move_ticket` (should get
error response)
- [x] Try dragging an unresolved ticket to a completed sprint section in
the UI (should show error toast)
- [ ] Verify that a ticket with a resolution CAN be moved to a completed
sprint (retroactive bookkeeping)
- [x] Verify that setting resolution and sprint in the same API call
works when targeting a completed sprint

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix job type detection for part-time and contract jobs

mapJobType now checks German keywords (Teilzeit, Vollzeit, Minijob,
Werkstudent, Praktikum, Geringfügig, Freiberuflich, Befristet) in
addition to English ones. Both Arbeitnow and Arbeitsagentur scrapers
now infer job type from the title text, not just API metadata fields
which often contain experience levels instead of work schedules.

feat: principal engineer review with adversarial + synthesis phases

Three-phase review architecture:
- Phase B: 8 specialist agents (bugs, security, tests, architecture)
- Phase C: Adversarial agent constructs specific breaking inputs,
  checks regressions and cross-file interactions
- Phase D: Synthesis as a principal engineer - deduplicates, scores,
  self-critiques, and checks for gaps before posting

Primed as a principal engineer who stakes their reputation on findings.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix cache: use curly apostrophes in get_examples() to match PRECOMPUTED_CLASSIFICATIONS

The /api/examples endpoint was returning straight apostrophes (ASCII 39)
but PRECOMPUTED_CLASSIFICATIONS uses curly apostrophes (U+2019).
This mismatch caused cache lookups to fail on Render.

commit.message:
Add production PDMRG/PDMRG2 GPU with hipTensor environments and Josephson MPO

- pdmrg_gpu.cpp: Stream-parallelized BLAS-2 DMRG with full hipTensor
  environment contractions, Lanczos eigensolver, exact SVD
- pdmrg2_gpu.cpp: GPU-optimized BLAS-3 DMRG with hipTensor H_eff
  application, adaptive CPU/GPU contraction based on problem size
- josephson_mpo.cpp: Josephson junction MPO (d=5, complex128) with
  external flux threading for charge basis operators
- gpu_benchmark.sh: CPU vs GPU comparison script
- Both Heisenberg (d=2) and Josephson (d=5) models supported
- Exact SVD only (no randomized approximations)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add trustedProxyDepth option for multi-proxy deployments

Extracts the real client IP from X-Forwarded-For[-depth] instead of
always using the rightmost entry. Essential for Railway (behind Fastly
CDN) where depth=2 skips the CDN entry to reach the actual caller IP.
